# Sale Promotion Rule Assortment

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:dff54e8ed7351e6210528d9d5280f05fe6eba0ea217e8add269a7276773a0b0a
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This addon allows to reduce the appliance of a promotion rule to a set of
products.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Enter the menu through Product Assortment Icon
2. Create a new filter where you can define your domain and add whitelisted and blacklisted products
3. Create a promotion rule and limit it to the assortment you just created

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20sale_promotion_rule_assortment%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_promotion_rule_assortment.tests.test_promotion_rule_assortment.TestPromotionRuleAssortment.test_promotion_rule_assortment
documentation:
Test auto appliance of a automatic promotion rule on a reduced of
products.
- it should be applied on consumable products
- it should not be applied on service products
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_promotion_rule_assortment.tests.test_promotion_rule_assortment.TestPromotionRuleAssortment.test_promotion_rule_assortment_minimum_not_reached
documentation:
Test auto appliance of a automatic promotion rule on a reduced of
products.
- it should be applied on consumable products only if minimum amount
is reached
- it should not be applied on service products
:return:
